title: Submission of more than one bid; financial interest in other bids
doc_html:
§254.  Submission of more than one bid; financial interest in other bids

No bidder shall submit more than one bid on any one project nor shall any bidder submit an additional bid under another or a different name.  No bidder shall be directly financially interested in any bid submitted by another bidder.
doc_text:
§254.  Submission of more than one bid; financial interest in other bids
No bidder shall submit more than one bid on any one project nor shall any bidder submit an additional bid under another or a different name.  No bidder shall be directly financially interested in any bid submitted by another bidder.
